briefdescription.para: WDT tasks.
WDT events.

detaileddescription.para: WDT will run when CPU is in SLEEP mode.
WDT will run when CPU is in HALT mode.

briefdescription.para: WDT behavior in the SLEEP or HALT CPU modes.
WDT reload request registers.
WDT reload request registers mask.
WDT interrupts.
Function for configuring the watchdog behaviour when the CPU is sleeping or halted.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Watchdog behaviour mask, created using nrf_wdt_behaviour_mask_t.

briefdescription.para: Function for starting the WDT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the WDT event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the WDT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_wdt_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_wdt_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_wdt_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified non-maskable interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_wdt_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified non-maskable interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_wdt_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling a specified non-maskable interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_wdt_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given WDT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given WDT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given WDT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given WDT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given WDT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given WDT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the address of a specific WDT task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the address of a specific WDT event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the watchdog status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The watchdog is started.
The watchdog is not started.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the watchdog reload request status for specified register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Reload request register to be checked.
Reload request is running.
No reload requests are running.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the watchdog reload requests status mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Running reload requests mask, constructed with nrf_wdt_rr_register_mask_t.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the watchdog reload value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Watchdog counter initial value.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the watchdog reload value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling a specific reload request register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Reload request register to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling a specific reload request register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Reload request register to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the status of a specific reload request register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Reload request register to be checked.
The reload request register is enabled.
The reload request register is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting a specific reload request register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Reload request register to set.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling or disabling stopping the watchdog.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if stopping is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Macro getting pointer to the structure of registers of the WDT peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: WDT instance index.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the WDT peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Presence of Task STOP functionality.
Presence of non-maskable interrupt configuration.
Number of WDT channels.
WDT register reload value.
WDT maximum reload value in miliseconds.
Hardware access layer for managing the Watchdog Timer (WDT) peripheral.
